mnemonics.title: Mask R-CNN Components
mnemonics.content: ROI Align, FPN, Mask Head - Remember 'Real Features Matter'

mnemonics.title: Segmentation Metrics
mnemonics.content: mAP, IoU, PQ - 'Measure All Precise Quality'

visualTips.visualization: Imagine aligning features like puzzle pieces without cropping
Picture different colored masks for each car in traffic

analogies.analogy: Like coloring book - same color for all trees
Like giving each tree a unique color in coloring book
